mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_EXAM_ANSWER.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO EXAM_ANSWER( ID, CONTENT, VALID, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, ENABLED_FLAG, ANSWER_IDX, QUESTION_ID )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{content,jdbcType=BLOB}, #{valid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1 , #{answerIdx,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{questionId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EXAM_ANSWER SET CONTENT=#{content,jdbcType=BLOB}, VALID=#{valid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DATE=SYSDATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY=#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ANSWER_IDX=#{answerIdx,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE EXAM_ANSWER SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM EXAM_ANSWER,EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL,EXAM_QUESTION WHERE EXAM_QUESTION."ID"=EXAM_ANSWER.QUESTION_ID AND EXAM_QUESTION."ID"=EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL.QUESTION_ID AND EXAM_QUESTION.ENABLED_FLAG=1 AND EXAM_ANSWER.ENABLED_FLAG=1 AND EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL.PAPERS_ID=#{paperId} ORDER BY EXAM_ANSWER.ID
